name: Market Crossroads
seasonal_change: Floods, heat, and flip-season congestion alter which lanes and ferries are usable.
seasonal_effects: Floods, heat, and flip-season congestion alter which lanes and ferries are usable.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
